allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: implement TempoKids Time Timer v1.2.0

Complete visual timer PWA for kids with clock-based countdown circles:

Features:
- Duration picker with hours/minutes \(max 4 hours, 4 circles\)
- Clock circles display: full circles first, partial last
- Clockwise drain from 12h position using SVG path arcs
- Sequential draining: first circle empties first
- Timer controls: start, pause, resume, reset
- Pause animation with pulsation effect
- Mobile-first responsive design optimized for mobile/tablet
- Reset on page reload \(no persistence across reloads\)
- PWA support: offline mode, installable

Technical implementation:
- React 18+ with TypeScript
- Vite build tool with vite-plugin-pwa
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- SVG path with arc commands for precise clockwise control
- maxFillPercentage tracking for clockwise drain behavior
- Custom hooks: useTimer, useLocalStorage
- 47 passing tests \(Vitest\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
